title: Path to Stationarity for Linear Nonstationary Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of identifying and transforming a nonstationary time series into a stationary one using differencing.
relationships: Apply first difference to original series to remove trend
Check stationarity; if not achieved, apply second difference
After d differences, a stationary series is obtained
Model the resulting stationary series with an appropriate ARMA(p,q) process
